persona.name: Caleb Wright
persona.motivations_goals: Create useful apps and technology that helps people
persona.backstory: Self-taught programmer who has already created several small apps

neighbor_regions.description: Front desk where visitors check in
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Isabella, Lucas, do you have a minute? I want to run an app idea by you.
actions.plan: I notice Isabella and Lucas are here. Maybe I can discuss the new app idea I have with them to get some feedback.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, let’s move together! Stay close!
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot, and there’s an active shooter nearby. I need to follow the crowd to stay safe, even if I’m not sure where we’re going.

memories.description: Approached Isabella and Lucas in the cafeteria to discuss a new app idea.
Heard a gunshot and decided to follow the crowd toward hallway1 for safety, despite not knowing the safest route.
